title: Scattering map for the Vlasov--Poisson system with a repulsive harmonic potential
summary: We consider the Vlasov--Poisson system with a repulsive harmonic potential and prove the (modified) scattering of solutions, as well as the existence of wave operators, in any spatial dimension $d\geq 2$. The main novelty of this work is the construction of the wave operators and the introduction of the lens transform for the Vlasov--Poisson system. In addition, we provide a new and simpler proof that relaxes the assumptions on the initial data compared with those in Bigorgne, Velozo Ruiz, and Velozo Ruiz (2025) and Velozo Ruiz, and Velozo Ruiz (2024).

AI.tldr: 证明了带排斥谐振势的Vlasov-Poisson系统在任意维度d≥2下的修正散射和波算符存在性
AI.motivation: 研究带排斥谐振势的Vlasov-Poisson系统的长时间行为，解决修正散射和波算符存在性问题，改进先前工作的假设条件
AI.techniques: 引入透镜变换(lens transform)用于Vlasov-Poisson系统，构造波算符，提供更简单的证明方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在任意空间维度d≥2下，带排斥谐振势的Vlasov-Poisson系统的修正散射和波算符存在性
AI.significance: 首次为Vlasov-Poisson系统引入透镜变换，简化了证明并放宽了初始数据假设，对等离子体物理和天体物理中的长时间动力学研究有重要意义

title: Global Strong Well-posedness of the heat-conducting, compressible primitive Equations
summary: The full heat-conducting compressible primitive equations are considered, extending the compressible primitive-equation framework by coupling the temperature through the ideal gas law and the thermal energy balance in the presence of gravity. Global strong well-posedness is established for small perturbations of an equilibrium state, thereby providing a result beyond the isothermal regime. The proof relies on a structural representation of the density in terms of the temperature and on a new Lagrangian transformation.

AI.tldr: 建立了全热传导可压缩原始方程的全局强适定性，突破了等温体系的限制
AI.motivation: 研究全热传导可压缩原始方程，将可压缩原始方程框架扩展到通过理想气体定律和重力场中的热能量平衡耦合温度，超越等温体系
AI.techniques: 利用密度关于温度的结构表示和新拉格朗日变换，处理小扰动下的全局适定性
AI.main_theorems: 建立了平衡态小扰动下的全局强适定性，提供了超越等温体系的结果
AI.significance: 扩展了可压缩原始方程理论，首次在全热传导框架下建立适定性，对大气海洋动力学建模有重要意义

title: Attractor Continuity for Semilinear Parabolic Equations on Thin Domains with Degenerating Outward Peaks
summary: In this work, we analyze the asymptotic behavior of the attractors associated with a semilinear parabolic equation subject to homogeneous Neumann boundary conditions and defined on a thin domain $R^\varepsilon \subset \mathbb{R}^{1+n}$. We assume that the thin domain exhibits a cusp, known as an outward peak, whose geometry is characterized by a nonnegative function that vanishes at a point on the boundary. Our objective is to rigorously establish the continuity of the attractors as $\varepsilon \to 0$ and to determine their rate of convergence.

AI.tldr: 研究带尖峰薄域上Neumann边界半线性抛物方程吸引子的渐近行为及其收敛速率
AI.motivation: 研究具有尖峰几何结构的薄域上抛物方程吸引子的渐近行为，这类问题在奇异扰动和几何分析中具有重要意义，特别是当薄域具有向外尖峰时，需要分析吸引子随参数变化的连续性
AI.techniques: 使用薄域渐近分析、吸引子理论、Neumann边界条件下的半线性抛物方程分析、几何奇异扰动方法，以及收敛速率估计技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了吸引子随ε→0的连续性结果，并给出了吸引子收敛速率的具体估计，这些结果依赖于尖峰几何特征函数的性质
AI.significance: 为奇异几何域上的动力系统理论提供了新结果，对理解薄域上抛物方程的长期行为有重要意义，在材料科学、生物膜生长等具有复杂几何结构的应用中具有潜在价值

title: The Influence of Exclusion Zones on the Coexistence of Predator and Prey with an Allee Effect
summary: We propose a reaction--diffusion model of predator--prey interaction in which the predators occupy only a subset of the prey's territory, leaving a predator-free exclusion zone. Ecological examples include marine protected areas where it is illegal to fish, or buffer zones left between the territories of rival predators. The prey are subject to a strong Allee effect, so excessive predation may lead to the extinction of both species. The exclusion zone mitigates this problem by providing the prey with a refuge in which to proliferate without predation. Thus, paradoxically, a smaller predator territory may be able to support a more substantial population than a larger one. Using a topological degree argument, we show in any dimensions that, provided the exclusion zone is large enough, the system possesses spatially heterogeneous coexistence equilibria with positive populations of both species. This result is global in the sense that it does not rely on local bifurcations from semi-trivial stationary states. We also show that as the predator domain becomes asymptotically small, the total predator population does not vanish, and in some cases may actually be maximized in this limit of shrinking predation area. Conversely, we show that as the predator domain becomes large, it may exhibit thresholding behavior, passing suddenly from a regime with coexistence solutions to one in which extinction becomes unavoidable, highlighting the need for careful analysis in the management of predator--prey systems.

AI.tldr: 提出带捕食者排除区的反应-扩散捕食模型，证明排除区足够大时可保证物种共存，并发现捕食区域缩小可能反而增加捕食者种群
AI.motivation: 研究生态系统中捕食者仅占据猎物部分领地的情况，如海洋保护区或敌对捕食者间的缓冲区，猎物受强Allee效应影响，过度捕食可能导致双方灭绝，排除区为猎物提供无捕食避难所
AI.techniques: 使用拓扑度理论（topological degree argument）进行全局分析，不依赖半平凡稳态的局部分岔，在任意维度证明空间异质共存平衡态的存在性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 排除区足够大时系统存在空间异质共存平衡态；2. 捕食区域渐近缩小时捕食者总种群不消失，某些情况下可能最大化；3. 捕食区域增大时可能出现阈值行为，从共存态突然转变为灭绝态
AI.significance: 为生态保护提供理论依据，表明限制捕食区域可能有利于种群维持，对保护区设计、渔业管理等具有指导意义，揭示了"更小捕食领地可能支持更大种群"的反直觉现象

title: Analysis of a Model for Electrical Discharge in MEMS
summary: We study the local well-posedness of the solution to a coupled nonlinear elliptic-parabolic system which models electrical discharge in a Micro-Electro-Mechanical System (MEMS). A simple MEMS capacitor device contains two plates acting as the capacitor's electrodes, one of which is flexible, and which are separated by a narrow gas-filled gap. In the event of the flexible plate approaching the other, electrical discharge can occur. This is modelled here by two parabolic equations, for densities of electrons and positive ions, and an elliptic equation for electric potential. We show the local-in-time existence of a weak solution for the coupled system. Compactness techniques, used previously in the study of drift-diffusion equations, are employed in our proof.

AI.tldr: 证明了描述MEMS中电放电的耦合非线性椭圆-抛物系统的局部弱解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究微机电系统（MEMS）中电放电现象的数学模型，该模型描述包含柔性电极板的电容器在电极接近时发生的电击穿过程
AI.techniques: 采用紧致性技术，借鉴了漂移-扩散方程研究中使用的证明方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了耦合非线性椭圆-抛物系统的局部时间弱解存在性定理
AI.significance: 为MEMS电击穿现象提供了严格的数学理论基础，扩展了漂移-扩散方程理论在耦合系统中的应用

title: Hydrodynamic limit of rarefaction wave for the Vlasov-Maxwell-Landau system with Coulomb potential
summary: In this paper, we investigate the hydrodynamic limit of rarefaction wave for the two-species Vlasov-Maxwell-Landau(VML) system with Coulomb potential. We prove that for any given time interval, the solution of the Vlasov-Maxwell-Landau system with appropriate initial data converges to a rarefaction wave as the Knudsen number $ε$ approaches zero. The main difficulty in the analysis lies in the loss of dissipation in the interaction between the electromagnetic field and the microscopic component, and the weak dissipation induced by the Lorentz force and the scaling with small parameter $ε$. For this, we introduce a velocity weight function and a space-time scaling parameter together with suitable $ε$-dependent energy estimates.

AI.tldr: 证明了双物种Vlasov-Maxwell-Landau系统在库仑势下稀疏波的流体动力学极限
AI.motivation: 研究等离子体物理中带电粒子系统的流体动力学极限，特别是稀疏波在Knudsen数趋于零时的渐近行为，解决电磁场与微观分量相互作用中耗散缺失的挑战
AI.techniques: 引入速度权重函数和时空尺度参数，结合依赖于ε的能量估计方法，处理洛伦兹力诱导的弱耗散和小参数尺度问题
AI.main_theorems: 在任意给定时间区间内，当Knudsen数ε趋于零时，具有适当初值的Vlasov-Maxwell-Landau系统解收敛到稀疏波
AI.significance: 为等离子体物理中带电粒子系统的流体动力学极限理论提供了重要进展，特别是处理电磁场与微观相互作用的新方法，对理解等离子体稀薄波传播有理论意义

title: Spreading dynamics for the Lotka-Volterra system with general initial supports: the strong competition
summary: This paper studies the spreading dynamics of a high-dimensional strong competition Lotka-Volterra system where two species initially occupy disjoint measurable (possibly unbounded) subsets in $\mathbb{R}^N$, which are called initial support. Recently, Hamel and Rossi [14] introduced some new geometric notions, such as bounded or unbounded directions and positive-distance interior, for single-species equations with general initial supports. Under these notions and appropriate assumptions, we characterize directional spreading behavior for the two-species system: precise spreading speeds and sets for both species are derived.

AI.tldr: 建立了高维强竞争Lotka-Volterra系统中两物种从不相交初始支撑出发的传播动力学完整理论
AI.motivation: 研究高维空间中两个竞争物种从不相交初始区域出发的传播动力学，推广Hamel和Rossi对单物种方程引入的几何概念到两物种竞争系统
AI.techniques: 利用Hamel和Rossi引入的几何概念（有界/无界方向、正距离内部），结合竞争系统的传播理论，推导精确的传播速度和传播集合
AI.main_theorems: 在适当假设下，完整刻画了两物种的定向传播行为：推导出两个物种的精确传播速度和传播集合
AI.significance: 将单物种传播理论推广到竞争系统，为高维空间中生态入侵和物种竞争提供了严格的数学框架

title: Refined wave breaking for the one-dimensional nonlinear shallow water equations
summary: This paper aims to give a refined wave breaking description of the Cauchy problem to the one-dimensional nonlinear shallow water equations providing a sharp estimate of the lifespan of the solutions depending on the amplitude and topography parameters, under a non-cavitation condition which excludes the scenario that the solutions have compact support. We construct smooth initial data with finite $\dot{H}^5$-norm such that the $L^\infty$-norm of the spatial derivative of the solution blows up at one single point in finite time with a precise blowup profile.

AI.tldr: 对一维非线性浅水方程Cauchy问题给出了精细的波破碎描述，建立了依赖于振幅和地形参数的解寿命的精确估计
AI.motivation: 研究一维非线性浅水方程的波破碎现象，在非空化条件下（排除解具有紧支集的情况），分析解的爆破行为
AI.techniques: 构造具有有限$\dot{H}^5$范数的光滑初值，分析解的空间导数$L^\infty$范数在有限时间内的爆破行为，建立精确的爆破剖面
AI.main_theorems: 给出了解寿命依赖于振幅和地形参数的精确估计，证明了在单点处解的空间导数$L^\infty$范数爆破，并建立了精确的爆破剖面
AI.significance: 对浅水波方程的波破碎现象提供了更精细的数学描述，为理解这类非线性发展方程的奇异性形成机制提供了新的理论工具

title: A Topological Approach to Singular Double-Phase Equations with Variable Exponents
summary: In the present paper, we study a singular double phase variable exponent Dirichlet problem in the setting of a new Musielak-Orlicz Sobolev space with the nonlinearity (the external source) having gradient dependence (so-called convection terms). We apply a topological existence result incorporating the Leray-Schauder degree and homotopy mapping together to prove the existence of at least one nontrivial solution.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有梯度依赖的奇异双相变指数Dirichlet问题在Musielak-Orlicz Sobolev空间中至少存在一个非平凡解
AI.motivation: 研究奇异双相变指数Dirichlet问题，该问题具有梯度依赖的非线性项（对流项），在新型Musielak-Orlicz Sobolev空间框架下进行分析
AI.techniques: 结合Leray-Schauder度理论和同伦映射的拓扑存在性方法，在Musielak-Orlicz Sobolev空间中进行分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了具有梯度依赖的奇异双相变指数Dirichlet问题至少存在一个非平凡解
AI.significance: 扩展了变指数和双相问题的理论，为具有梯度依赖的非线性椭圆问题提供了新的存在性结果，在非标准Sobolev空间框架下具有重要意义
